info.label: Requires
info.value: GitHub CLI (`gh`), authenticated. `gh --json` emits clean JSON arrays.

info.label: Showcase
info.value: format:table renders the array; query extracts a field. Same output for humans, scripts and agents.

items.name: Open PRs (table)
items.description: List open pull requests as a table.
items.help: Uses `gh pr list --json ...` and renders the JSON array as an ASCII table.

items.name: Open PR titles only
items.description: Just the titles of open PRs, one per line.
items.help: Same data, but a JSONPath query projects a single field.

items.name: Recent workflow runs (table)
items.description: Latest CI runs with status and conclusion.

items.name: Open issues (table)
items.description: List open issues as a table.

items.name: Repo summary (pretty JSON)
items.description: Key facts about this repo, pretty-printed.
items.help: format:json pretty-prints; handy for reading nested output in the terminal.

items.name: Create issue
items.description: Open a new issue with a title you type.
